title: onagra biennis var. strigosa
intro: Onagra biennis var. strigosa, also known as Downy Evening Primrose, is a perennial flowering plant in the Onagraceae family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of gamma-linolenic acid (GLA), an essential fatty acid that has anti-inflammatory effects. The plant's seeds, leaves, and roots have been used in herbal preparations to alleviate symptoms of menopausal hot flashes, skin conditions, and inflammatory diseases, offering health benefits such as improved skin health, reduced inflammation, and enhanced cardiovascular well-being. Herbal preparations of Downy Evening Primrose include oil extracts, capsules, and teas, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
